Short CV

Asst. Prof. Emre UYAR graduated from Anadolu University, Faculty of Pharmacy in 2008. He completed his master's degree in the Department of Pharmacology in 2012 and in 2018, his doctorate in the Department of Pharmacology at Dicle University.
